description: Model-specific repair rules for GLM / Zhipu AI models (GLM-4, GLM-4-Flash, GLM-4-Plus). Per the Command Code talk, GLM makes fewer tool-call mistakes than DeepSeek, but still benefits from targeted repairs for edge cases.

repairs._comment: GLM sometimes uses 'name' when tools expect 'path' (file operations)
GLM occasionally sends 'value' when tools expect 'content'
GLM string-number repair for numeric params
